name: scsynthdef-compiler-ugens-browser
description: Browser-side documentation viewer for the UGens bundled with scsynthdef-compiler. Loads the wasm-pack build and renders every UGen's metadata.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && wasm-pack build --target web --features wasm && rm -rf examples/frontend/pkg && cp -R pkg examples/frontend/pkg && rm -rf pkg
